Job update: Work24 sample job information for foreign workers

Summary

Why it matters

shortSummary: Sample employment source for GENERATED queue validation.
whyItMatters: This helps foreign workers and residents in Korea screen employment information before spending time on applications or calls.
checkNext:
1. Open the original job posting and confirm the deadline.
2. Check work location, contract type, salary basis and visa compatibility.
3. Contact the employer or Work24/WorkNet before sharing personal documents.
